summary: Implementation review approved for GH-101 branch head 22c258927ee466c87ab72cdc15a547826ffda1f1. The change adds a narrow dependency-free Core runtime helper for read-only Task Intent parsing, private-field rejection before persistence, and accepted/admitted Run Record creation, with targeted self-check coverage. The PR does not add API routes, runtime execution, Harbor/Lode consumption, result projection, evidence retrieval, hosted storage, or true-write behavior.
reviewed_validation_summary: GH-101 pre-PR validation passed on 2026-07-01 UTC: `pnpm --filter @webenvoy/core-runtime test`; `pnpm build`; `pnpm typecheck`; `pnpm test`; `pnpm lint`; `pnpm conformance`; `git diff --check`; `jq empty .loom/bootstrap/init-result.json .loom/specs/GH-101/build-evidence.json`; `loom doctor --target . --json`; `loom verify --target . --json`; `loom fact-chain --target . --json`; `loom suite validate --target . --item GH-101 --json`; `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-101 --json`; `loom suite evidence validate --target . --item GH-101 --json`; packaged `loom_flow.py flow build --target . --item GH-101 --build-evidence .loom/specs/GH-101/build-evidence.json` attempt `GH-101-build-a3eca451f5f3-6aaa473942f0`; post-commit packaged build attempts `GH-101-build-e630c1d905fc-3331eb711ed7` and `GH-101-build-29148d06b457-e4bb571b3211`; PR #119 readback and `loom pr metadata-preflight` passed for head `29148d06b45717b565a7a584a97c51bb7118722c`. Review-readiness source-distribution tools are not applicable to this consumer repo because there is no `tools/` directory and `tools/skills_surface.py check`, `tools/loom_check.py --profile source --source-surface contract-only`, `tools/check_release_surface.py`, `tools/version_surface_check.py`, and `tools/check_npm_package.py` are absent. `loom doctor` reported installed CLI v0.25.0 stale against npm 0.26.2 while installed diagnostics passed and plugin payload was current. Hosted checks, merge, and post-merge closeout remain pending.
